name: ROCKWELL AUTOMATION, INC
summary: General Rockwell Automation, Inc. (Rockwell Automation or the Company) is the worlds largest company dedicated to industrial automation and digital transformation. We understand and simplify our customers complex production challenges and deliver the most valued solutions that combine technology and industry expertise.
